results.original_requirement: The system shall allow users to access the dashboard immediately after login.
The system shall require admin approval before granting dashboard access.
The system shall store user data indefinitely unless deleted by the user.
The system shall automatically delete user data after 6 months of inactivity.
The system shall allow users to search all available products without restrictions.
The system shall limit product search results based on user role permissions.
The system shall allow users to recover deleted accounts within 30 days.
The system shall permanently delete user accounts immediately upon deletion request.
The system shall allow users to change their email address freely.
The system shall restrict email changes to one time per account only.
The system shall allow users to register using email and password.
results.atomicity_violations: Multiple actions: allow, use | Multiple coordinated targets: password, email

The system shall allow users to log in using email and password.

results.original_requirement: The system shall allow users to reset their password via email verification.
The system shall require admin approval for resetting user passwords.
The system shall allow users to place orders without signing in.
The system shall require users to be logged in before placing any order.
The system shall process refund requests within 24 hours of submission.
The system shall process refund requests within 3 to 5 business days.
The system shall automatically assign the nearest available delivery driver.
The system shall allow restaurant managers to manually assign delivery drivers.
The system shall allow students to access course content without registration.
The system shall require students to register before accessing learning materials.
The system shall automatically mark a student as passed after video completion.
The system shall require students to pass quizzes and assignments to complete a course.
results.atomicity_violations: Multiple actions: complete, pass, require | Multiple coordinated targets: quizzes, assignments

The system shall allow users to delete their messages permanently.
The system shall store all messages permanently and prevent deletion.
The system shall respond to user requests within 1 second.
The system shall respond to user requests within 5 seconds under normal load.
